ONE WEEK ONLY! SALE ON SALE: EXTRA 20% OFF. ONLINE & IN STORES.

SHOP THE SALE

20% off all markdowns from 7/1/26 at 12am PT to 7/7/26 at 11:59pm PT. Discount applied automatically at checkout, taken off of redlined markdown price. Offer valid online at rothys.com, or at Rothy’s official retail stores and outlets during local store hours; any third-party retailers offering discounts are subject to their own terms and conditions.  All items sold as part of The Semi Annual Event are offered at limited quantities for a limited time, while supplies last. Sale prices cannot be retroactively applied to purchases made before the event began. May not be combined with any other offers, promotions, or discounts. Prices are as marked. Products marked Final Sale cannot be returned, exchanged or refunded for cash value or store credit. Valid only in the US, Canada, Australia, and New Zealand. Discounts may vary due to exchange rates and taxes. Void where prohibited.

The Point II

Size Chart

The Point II is a true B width size. For a roomier fit, or for those with wider feet, we recommend ordering a wide width size. Learn More

Still not sure what your size is?
Let's Chat
MACHINE WASHABLE

Toss in the wash with cold water. Air dry. Boom.

IN LOVE INSOLE® COMFORT

Features our innovative insole for unbelievable, cushion-like comfort.

RECYCLED PLASTIC BOTTLES

It took about 10 plastic bottles to knit these shoes. See how we calculate it.

Details

The Point II in Black


  • Premium knit upper in black with a smooth, refined shape.
  • Features our In Love Insole® in black for heel-to-toe cushioning and all-day wearability.
  • More spacious toe box for less scrunching and bunching.
  • Added elastic gently expands and contracts for all-day wearability.
  • Black sculpted outsoles provide added comfort and stability.

SKU 152_001_BLK

Washing Instructions

  • All of our styles are machine washable—so they last for the long haul. Learn more.
  • Slip out insoles. Toss insoles and shoes in the wash with cold water. 
  • Air dry. No heat, please.
  • Wear again and again.

Sustainability

  • Knit from Rothy’s signature thread, which is spun from plastic bottles. Learn more.
  • It took about 10 plastic bottles to knit this pair of shoes.
THE POINT II
  • Chic style. A pointed toe box and refined shape offers a sleek silhouette.
  • Perfected fit. Added elastic gently expands and contracts for all-day wearability.
  • Luxe comfort. Features our In Love Insole® for irresistible, all-day comfort.
